title: brain db migrate — --json success output
description: Apply pending, checksum-guarded SQLite migrations (DDL) in id order. Intrinsically idempotent: an already-applied migration is a checksum-verified no-op, and the runner never drops tables on downgrade. Acquires the exclusive vault-maintenance lock. This is the sole writer of vault_schema_migrations / db_schema_migrations and must run to completion before any db rebuild.

head.description: The highest applied migration id after this run.

alreadyApplied.description: Migration ids that were already applied (checksum-verified no-op).

x-atlas-contract.summary: Apply checksum-guarded SQLite migrations (DDL); idempotent, never drops tables.
sideEffects: applies pending migration DDL inside a transaction
prohibitedEffects: never drops a table on downgrade
does not run projection rebuild (that is db rebuild)

errorCodes.when: the SQLite store file is missing or unopenable
the exclusive vault-maintenance lock is held by a live process
an applied migration's recorded checksum does not match its definition
a migration statement failed to execute (transaction rolled back)
